audience: English-speaking global audience plus LATAM, vibrant tropical and festive aesthetic

sphere.concept: tiny 3D bright papel-picado flower charm with lime and yellow petals, not a ball, not a geometric shape
sphere.styleNotes: festive glossy paper-craft look, white and lemon-yellow highlights, transparent background, high contrast against dark turquoise bg

trump.concept: loaded street taco with bright fillings, lime, and cilantro on a soft tortilla
trump.styleNotes: 3D rendered food, vibrant colors, food photography lighting, isolated, high contrast against turquoise bg

money.concept: mango paleta ice pop with chili-lime flakes on a wooden stick
money.styleNotes: 3D rendered popsicle, glossy fruit, condensation droplets, vivid orange, high contrast against turquoise bg

poop.concept: miniature colorful donkey piñata in tissue paper fringe
poop.styleNotes: 3D rendered piñata, layered paper texture, hot pink and turquoise and yellow, high contrast against turquoise bg

cube.concept: pair of colorful Mexican maracas with painted folk patterns in turquoise and hot pink
cube.styleNotes: 3D rendered, isolated centered, festive, transparent background

triangle.concept: single triangular papel picado pennant in hot pink with intricate cut-paper floral pattern
triangle.styleNotes: 3D rendered paper craft, isolated centered, transparent background

background.concept: top-down view of a beach boardwalk with mosaic tile pattern and palm shadow stripes, no people
background.styleNotes: bright painterly, turquoise and sun-yellow palette, festive low-noise
